title: Gray Glass Invisible Inventory
description: Testing your friends' eyesight! 锻炼你朋友的眼力！
body:
## 📦 Resource Pack Introduction

This is a resource pack born with one purpose: **testing your friends' eyesight**.

It modifies the models of **every item** in the game, rendering them as nearly invisible **light gray glass panes** in the inventory. Whether you're holding a diamond sword or a netherite pickaxe, whether your backpack is stuffed with rare treasures or common cobblestone—visually, they all become translucent glass squares.

Simply put: **Your inventory will always look empty.**

---

## 🎯 Key Features

| Feature | Description |
|------|------|
| **Ultra Minimalist** | All tools, weapons, armor, blocks, food, miscellaneous items… unified under the appearance of light gray glass panes |
| **Visual Stealth** | Inventories appear completely empty, chests look looted, shulker boxes resemble piles of transparent junk |
| **Multi-Version Support** | Compatible with mainstream Minecraft versions (supports Java Edition 1.20.5+) |
| **Lightweight & Lag-Free** | Only replaces item model files—no impact on game performance, zero stuttering |
| **Plug and Play** | No additional mods or configuration needed; activates immediately upon loading the resource pack |

---

## 🎭 The Ultimate Prank

This isn't just a resource pack—it's a **friendship tester**.

Watch your friends:

- Stare blankly at their inventory in confusion
- Double-check "empty chests," wondering if their eyes are playing tricks on them
- Stare at crafting tables, convinced they forgot to place materials
- Try using glass panes as tools for mining

...This kind of joy is simply irreplaceable.

---

## ⚠️ Warning

Before using, ensure your friends have a good sense of humor—or that you have an escape route planned.

This resource pack contains no cheats, only pure visual deception. The author assumes no responsibility for ruined friendships, vengeful pursuits, or reverse pranks resulting from this mischief.

---

## 📥 Installation Guide

1. Download the resource pack file (.zip format)
2. Open Minecraft, navigate to "Options" -> "Resource Packs"
3. Drag the downloaded zip file into the resource packs folder
4. Enable this resource pack
5. Wait for the moment your friend opens their inventory

---

## 📌 Pro Tip

If you're planning to sneak this pack into your friend's Minecraft folder:

- Make sure they won't dismantle your computer on the spot
- Back up their original resource pack beforehand (for easy restoration)
- Have your phone ready to record—the expression on their face when they open their inventory is priceless

---

*Turn every inventory opening into an eyesight test!*

---

## 📦 资源包简介

这是一个专门为了**锻炼朋友眼力**而诞生的资源包。

它修改了游戏中**所有物品**的模型，使其在物品栏中呈现为近乎不可见的**淡灰色玻璃板**。无论你是拿着钻石剑还是下界合金镐，无论背包里塞满了稀有物资还是普通石块——在视觉上，它们统统变成了半透明的玻璃方片。

简单来说：**你的背包看起来，永远是空的。**

---

## 🎯 功能特点

| 特性 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| **极致简约** | 所有的工具、武器、盔甲、方块、食物、杂物……外观全部统一为淡灰色玻璃板 |
| **视觉隐身** | 物品栏看起来空空如也，箱子仿佛被洗劫，潜影盒像是一堆透明废料 |
| **多版本兼容** | 适用于主流 Minecraft 版本（支持 Java 版 1.20.5+） |
| **轻量无延迟** | 仅替换物品模型文件，不影响游戏性能，无任何卡顿 |
| **即装即用** | 无需额外模组或配置，加载资源包后立刻生效 |

---

## 🎭 整蛊核心

这不仅仅是一个资源包，更是一把**友谊测试器**。

看着你的朋友：

- 打开背包时的茫然表情
- 在“空箱子”前反复确认自己是不是眼花了
- 对着工作台发呆，怀疑自己忘了放材料
- 试图把玻璃板当成工具拿去挖矿

……这种乐趣，无可替代。

---

## ⚠️ 警告

使用前请确认你的朋友有足够好的心态，或者你已经准备好了逃生路线。

本资源包不含任何作弊功能，只有满满的视觉欺诈。如因恶作剧导致友尽、被追杀、被反向整蛊，作者概不负责。

---

## 📥 安装方法

1. 下载资源包文件（.zip 格式）
2. 打开 Minecraft，进入“选项” -> “资源包”
3. 将下载的 zip 文件拖入资源包文件夹
4. 启用本资源包
5. 等待朋友打开背包的那一刻

---

## 📌 友情提示

如果你准备把这个包装到朋友的 Minecraft 文件夹里：

- 请确保他不会当场拆掉你的电脑
- 建议事先备份他的原版资源包（方便事后恢复）
- 准备好手机录像——他打开背包那一刻的表情，值得珍藏

---

*让每一次打开背包，都变成一场视力测试吧！*
